title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
summary: A YouTube video from Harvard's CS50 course in which Professor David J. Malan shares his personal journey to discovering computer science as his field. The video is part of CS50, a widely-distributed introduction to computer science and programming offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: Professor David J. Malan recounts his personal path to discovering that computer science was the right field for him. The clip comes from Harvard's CS50, an introduction to computer science and programming distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare. The takeaway is a firsthand account of how Malan arrived at the discipline, framed within one of the most widely circulated intro courses in the field.
